character_dossiers.name: Jim Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Witnessed the death of Master Pew, aided in rescuing his mother, and possessed an oilskin packet containing an item of interest.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Assisted in resolving the incident, received the oilskin packet, and hosted Jim Hawkins for supper.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Dance
character_dossiers.biography: Led a pursuit to apprehend the thieves, saved Jim Hawkins' mother, and coordinated with Dr. Livesey.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Hosted Dr. Livesey and Jim Hawkins, expressed approval of Jim's actions, and engaged in discussions about the incident.

character_dossiers.name: Master Pew
character_dossiers.biography: Attempted to pursue the thieves but was killed by a horse during the chase.

character_dossiers.name: my mother
character_dossiers.biography: Was rescued from danger and briefly incapacitated by fear but recovered.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Engaged in conversation with Dr. Livesey and expressed opinions on the events.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned in context of the stolen money-bag and the plot involving the lugger.
